description_long: This is a tall, ornate ceramic vase with a bulbous midsection and a flared rim and base. The surface is decorated with intricate hand-painted floral motifs, featuring blue, yellow, and green hues, as well as stylized birds and leafy vines. The rim and base are accented with blue bands, and the body displays raised, scroll-like embellishments on opposite sides. The glaze gives the vase a glossy, reflective finish, enhancing the vibrancy of the painted patterns. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding flowers or decorative arrangements. The craftsmanship and decorative style suggest it is intended as a display piece in a refined urban setting.
description: A tall, hand-painted ceramic vase with blue, yellow, and green floral and bird motifs, glossy finish, and decorative scroll accents. The vase features a flared rim and base with blue banding.
description_view_0: This view highlights the raised scroll embellishment and a prominent yellow bird among blue flowers on the front.
description_view_1: This side shows a different arrangement of birds and flowers, with the scroll embellishments less visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle displays the scroll accent and a mirrored floral motif, with the bird facing the opposite direction.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the floral and bird motifs, with the scroll embellishments mostly out of sight and the blue banding on the rim and base clearly visible.
attribute_pattern: floral and bird motifs with scrollwork
